title: Labor Code Provisions on Overseas Employment
content: The Labor Code of the Philippines includes specific provisions governing overseas employment to protect Filipino workers abroad. These provisions cover recruitment, deployment, welfare, and protection of overseas Filipino workers (OFWs). Key elements include regulation of recruitment agencies, mandatory pre-departure orientation seminars, contractual safeguards, and mechanisms for repatriation and legal assistance. The Code mandates coordination with the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) and other relevant agencies to ensure compliance and protection of workers' rights.
